summary: Iteration 46 - Lot Size and Streak Calculation Bug Fixes. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: 1) Daily Projection table correctly recalculates LOT Size based on running balance (Balance ÷ 980), 2) P/L Diff is calculated as (actual_profit - recalculated_target_profit), 3) Streak API returns correct streak count (9 days), 4) Holidays are properly defined in backend (HOLIDAYS set) and frontend (isHoliday function, OnboardingWizard HOLIDAYS Set).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend streak calculation (server.py lines 1338-1427): Correctly implements HOLIDAYS set with Christmas (Dec 25), Boxing Day (Dec 26), New Year's Eve (Dec 31), New Year's Day (Jan 1), and Jan 2. The is_trading_day() function checks both weekends and holidays.
Frontend isHoliday function (ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 77-111): Properly defines year-specific holidays and generic annual holidays. Uses JavaScript month indexing (0-11).

Frontend generateDailyProjectionForMonth (ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 119-262): Correctly recalculates LOT size based on running balance using formula: truncateTo2Decimals(runningBalance / 980). Target profit is calculated as lotSize * 15.
OnboardingWizard holidays (OnboardingWizard.jsx lines 26-34): HOLIDAYS Set includes all required dates in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

Trade History vs Daily Projection: Trade History shows stored LOT sizes from when trades were logged, while Daily Projection shows recalculated LOT sizes based on running balance. This is the expected behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Streak calculation now skips holidays (Christmas, Boxing Day, New Year) in addition to weekends - HOLIDAYS set defined in backend server.py lines 1343-1351. 2) Daily Projection table recalculates LOT Size based on running balance (Balance ÷ 980), not using stored values from trade logs. 3) Withdrawals (negative amounts in DB) are correctly applied to balance calculations. 4) P/L Difference is calculated as (actual_profit - recalculated_target_profit). 5) OnboardingWizard skips holidays when generating trading days list.

streak_api.details: GET /api/trade/streak returns streak=9, streak_type='trading', total_trades=30. Streak calculation correctly skips weekends and holidays.

daily_projection_table.details: Daily Projection - January 2026 shows recalculated LOT sizes based on running balance. Example: Jan 5 Balance $12,978.90 → LOT 13.24, Jan 16 Balance $18,738.19 → LOT 19.12.

lot_size_calculation.details: LOT Size formula verified: floor((balance / 980) * 100) / 100. Current LOT Size 19.32 matches Balance $18,941.87 ÷ 980.

pl_diff_calculation.details: P/L Diff correctly shows difference between actual profit and recalculated target profit. Green for positive, red for negative.

holiday_handling.details: Holidays defined in backend HOLIDAYS set, frontend isHoliday function, and OnboardingWizard HOLIDAYS Set. Includes: Christmas (Dec 25), Boxing Day (Dec 26), New Year's Eve (Dec 31), New Year's Day (Jan 1), Jan 2.

withdrawal_handling.details: Withdrawals endpoint returns list with negative amounts. Withdrawal simulation correctly calculates 3% Merin fee.

trade_history.details: Trade History shows stored LOT sizes from when trades were logged. Streak badge shows '9 streak'.

api_tests.GET /api/profit/withdrawals: PASS - Returns withdrawals with negative amounts
api_tests.GET /api/trade/logs: PASS - Returns trade history with LOT sizes
api_tests.POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal: PASS - Returns correct fee calculation (3% Merin fee)
api_tests.GET /api/trade/active-signal: PASS - Returns active SELL signal for MOIL10

ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Master admin can login successfully
ui_tests.dashboard_display: PASS - Shows Account Value $18,941.87, LOT SIZE 19.33, PROJECTED DAILY $289.93
ui_tests.profit_tracker_navigation: PASS - Can navigate to Profit Tracker page
ui_tests.monthly_table_tab: PASS - Monthly Table tab shows yearly projections with expandable months
ui_tests.daily_projection_modal: PASS - Daily View shows table with Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Actual Profit, P/L Diff columns
ui_tests.trade_monitor_page: PASS - Shows Current LOT Size 19.32, Projected Exit Value $289.80, Streak 9
ui_tests.trade_history_table: PASS - Shows trade history with stored LOT sizes and P/L Diff
